title: Prospect Game
description: A game that simulates the decision making process of a person in a risky situation. The game is based on the prospect theory, which is a behavioral economic theory that describes how people make decisions under risk.

title: Genre Prediction Based on Reviews
description: Made during DataHacks 2025, this project uses natural language processing to predict the genre of a video game genre based on its reviews.
